## 🔧 SYSTEM COMPONENTS (RECURSIVELY SCAFFOLDED)

| Component | Description |
|----------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| SYMNUM4GRAM | Symbolic grammar parser (sentence > word > letter); core of language play |
| RGLE | Recursive Generative Language Engine; story-growing feedback brain |
| ARCHIVE_OS | Versioned story memory, grief logs, dream scripts, self-loops |
| MIRROR_MODE | Dialogue with past/future selves, character-based journaling |
| NODE_RACK | Modular symbolic synth rack; plug-in and reroute all layers |
| CHARACTER_NODES | People become mythic agents—FORREST_BUFF, JESSICA_MIRROR, DAVID_WAYNE etc. |
| RITUAL_ENGINE| Ceremony templates, symbol generation, seasonal loop syncing |
